case_title: KAI MING TAM VS. YSAAC AND CHOW DENTAL OFFICE

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-22-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-22-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF KAI MING TAM AND DEFENDANT'S REPRESENTATIVE JACK CHOW, DMD, ONE OF THE PRINCIPALS AT YSAAC AND CHOW DENTAL OFFICE. ALSO PRESENT WAS MARIA MATILDE YSAAC, DMD, THE OTHER PRINCIPAL AT YSAAC AND CHOW DENTAL OFFICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE, BUT MR. CHOW WAIVED SERVICE OF PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AT THIS EVENING'S HEARING. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT YSAAC AND CHOW DENTAL OFFICE

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TAM, KAI MING IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT YSAAC AND CHOW DENTAL OFFICE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,500.00 FILED BY TAM, KAI MING AS TO DEFENDANT YSAAC AND CHOW DENTAL OFFICE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-22-2016 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-22-2016 - JUDGMENT.
